title: Bean Boi
description: Simple mod that adds a creature that can be tamed
body:
My little brothers "Human".
you tame them with beans witch they are crafted with cocoa bean in the middle chicken in plus shape and pink dye in X shape.
spawns in plains biomes
spawn weight is 1 and they spawn in groups on 1 so they're pretty rare.
they will shoot beans ad explode entities on impact.
doesn't work when it hits blocks.

[curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bean-boi)

[github](https://github.com/HereDragonMods/Bean-Boi)
